metadata.name: Decommission and Dispose of an Asset

description: An old, retired tank needs to be cleaned, decommissioned, and sent for scrap.

nodes.task_description: Verify the asset's status is 'Retired' and that it has been de-energized via LOTO.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the asset is safe to work on.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for a cleaning crew to remove any residual product from the tank.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a work order for cleaning.

nodes.task_description: Once clean, arrange for a scrap metal company to pick up the tank and provide a disposal certificate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent coordinates the pickup and uploads the disposal certificate to the asset's record.
